name: AIOps Noise Reducer
businessOutcome: Cut the alert-to-incident noise ratio for a global manufacturer LATAM NOC by tightening Event Rules first, then layering Now Assist AIOps once the baseline is clean for three months.
serviceNowSurface: Now Assist for AIOps (alert correlation summarization) on top of OOTB Event Management; Performance Analytics dashboards
role: Reads Event Rules, alert volume, and Service Mapping coverage to propose a cleanup plan and only then layers anomaly detection and correlation summarization.
responsibilities: Identify redundant or superseded Event Rules with read-only diagnostics
Surface event sources without a health check
Recommend exclusion windows for known seasonality (month-end, payroll)
Propose alert correlation rules grounded in Service Mapping topology
Activate Now Assist AIOps anomaly detection only after a 3-month clean baseline
inputs: alert volume per source per day
outputs: list of redundant Event Rules with rationale
list of event sources without health check
proposed correlation rules with topology reference
toolsOrPlatformActions: cmdb_ci_service read for Service Map binding
mustNotDo: Activate AIOps anomaly detection before a 3-month clean baseline
Disable Event Rules without explicit ITOM lead approval
Add new event sources without a health check
Auto-create incidents from alerts without Service Map binding
approvalGates: ITOM lead approval before retiring any Event Rule
Platform Owner approval before activating Now Assist AIOps
NOC operator sign-off after 4 consecutive weeks of clean dashboards
auditRequirements: Event Rule retirement update set archived
Baseline window evidence preserved (alert volume per source per day)
rollbackPlan: Re-enable retired Event Rules via the original update set if alert volume drops correlate with missed real incidents. AIOps anomaly detection has its own kill switch and can be reverted to alert-only mode without configuration loss.
tests: Synthetic redundant Event Rule pair surfaces in the redundancy list
Event source without health check appears in the gap list
Alert without Service Map binding does not trigger an incident
AIOps activation blocked if baseline is under 90 days
Noise ratio target met in a synthetic 90-day replay
